title: Cargo.toml: missing keywords + categories metadata for crate discoverability
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

**Dimension:** Documentation & Intent
**Lint:** clippy::cargo_common_metadata

## Violation
Cargo.toml lacks `package.keywords` and `package.categories` fields, both flagged by clippy at the cargo level. Required for crates.io publishing and improves discoverability.

## Locations
- Cargo.toml [package] section

## Mandated Refactor
```toml
[package]
keywords = ["agent", "llm", "claude", "proxy", "cli"]
categories = ["command-line-utilities", "development-tools"]
```
Constraint: ≤5 keywords, each ≤20 ASCII-alnum-hyphen chars. Categories must match the crates.io slug list.
